what_it_does: This file is a ledger record for a design-source image asset (company-info/p-09.jpg), holding YAML frontmatter metadata plus a one-line body label that identifies it as source design ground-truth.
observations: YAML frontmatter declares an image asset with id company-info/p-09 and address image://design-source/company-info/p-09
mime is image/jpeg but width and height are both 0
source field is design_source_material and author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r
Body line reads 'SOURCE design ground-truth — company-info/p-09.jpg'
standouts: Width and height are 0 for an image asset
Blob URI uses a b2-prefixed scheme
conventions: Uses YAML frontmatter with id, address, channel, path, blob, mime, name, w, h, source, author_session, created, links
Includes provenance fields source and author_session
References binary content via a blob URI rather than embedding it
concerns: Image dimensions are 0, suggesting metadata extraction is incomplete or pending
No descriptive caption, alt text, or tags for the image
links array is empty, so no explicit relationships are recorded
Blob integrity or location cannot be verified from this file alone
notes: A provenance stub for a design-source JPEG image with unresolved dimensions, a blob reference, and no outgoing links.
questions: Why are width and height recorded as 0?
What visual content does company-info/p-09.jpg contain?
How does design_source_material relate to other source categories?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated purpose is to record a SOURCE design ground-truth image, and the file does exactly that as a metadata ledger entry, so they align.
intention_signals: The file appears to be trying to register a design-source image as an authoritative ground-truth asset, making it addressable, attributable, and retrievable via a blob reference.
novelty: The 'SOURCE design ground-truth' body annotation and the blob://b2 URI scheme are distinctive, as is the presence of zero dimensions for an image record.
contribution: It contributes a stable, addressable record for a design-source image asset, including its channel identity, blob reference, MIME type, provenance metadata, and authorship session, which a fused system could keep for retrieval and audit.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a channel-memory ledger entry for the design-source JPEG image company-info/p-09, recording its blob URI, MIME type, zero dimensions, provenance metadata, and an empty link list.
intention_for_embedding: It was intended to catalog and preserve a design ground-truth image asset with traceable authorship and a stable storage reference.
